zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Clinton於1230年之後出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾可爾希爾時，他的父親Thomas Clinton8794歲，母親Mazera de Bisege8789歲。他於1265年之前與Isabel在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1316年3月12日。

nameMeanings.name: Clinton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Louth, Westmeath) and Scottish: shortened form of   McClinton  .

English: habitational name, either from Glympton in Oxfordshire, named as ‘settlement (Old English tūn) on the Glym river’, a Celtic river name meaning ‘bright stream’, or from Glinton in Northamptonshire, early recorded as Clinton (named with an unrecorded Old English element akin to Middle Low German glinde ‘enclosure, fence’ + Old English tūn). The surname was taken to Ireland in or before the 16th century.

History: Charles Clinton (born 1690 in Longford, Ireland) organized a group of colonists and founded the settlement of Little Britain, Ulster County, NY, in 1731. His son George Clinton (1739–1812) was governor of NY (1777–95), and they had many prominent descendants. — An English aristocratic family called Clinton was founded by Geoffrey de Clinton (flourished 1130), who held lands at Glympton, Oxfordshire. He was chamberlain and treasurer to Henry I (1100–35).

variants.name: McClinton
meanings: Irish (northern) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Fhionntain (Scottish), Mac Giolla Fhionntáin (Irish) ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) Fionntan’, whose name has been explained as ‘the white ancient’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Clinton was born after 1230, in Coleshill, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Clinton, was 8794 and his mother, Mazera de Bisege, was 8789. He married Isabel before 1265, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 12 March 1316.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Clinton est né après 1230, à Coleshill, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Clinton, avait 8794 ans et sa mère, Mazera de Bisege, avait 8789 ans. Il a épousé Isabel avant 1265, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 12 mars 1316.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Clinton nach 1230 in Coleshill, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Clinton 8794 und seine Mutter Mazera de Bisege 8789. Er hat vor 1265 in England Isabel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 12. März 1316.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Clinton è nato il dopo il 1230 nel Coleshill, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Clinton, aveva 8794 anni e il suo madre, Mazera de Bisege, aveva 8789 anni. Lui sposato Isabel prima del 1265, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 12 marzo 1316.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Clinton(이)가 1230년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 콜레시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Clinton(은)는 8794세였고, 그의 어머니 Mazera de Bisege(은)는 8789세였다. 그는 1265년 이전 영국에서 Isabel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1316년 3월 12일 사망했다.
